title: Filesystem MCP Server - MCP Servers
detailMarkdown:
# Filesystem MCP Server - MCP Servers
Official MCP server providing secure file system operations for Claude Desktop and Claude Code
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Anthropic
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `filesystem` `files` `directories` `official` `anthropic`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status filesystem
```

## Config
```json
{
  "filesystem": {
    "args": [
      "-y",
      "@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem",
      "/path/to/allowed/directory"
    ],
    "command": "npx"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status filesystem

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/filesystem-mcp-server
